requirement_topic.en: Battery and Charger Electrical Safety — CSA/SCC Certification Where Required
requirement_topic.zh: 电池和充电器电气安全——适用时须进行CSA/SCC认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電池和充電器電氣安全——適用時須進行CSA/SCC認證

summary.en: Canada does not treat CSA, UL, ULC, or similar standards as a voluntary CE-style presumption route when provincial electrical-safety law requires approved electrical equipment. The Standards Council of Canada Act establishes SCC's national standardization role; in practice, Canadian electrical approval is usually shown by a certification mark from an SCC-accredited certification body to the applicable Canadian standard. For e-bikes, the charger is normally the highest-priority electrical product for Canadian approval, and batteries/electrical systems may be assessed to applicable Canadian-adopted standards such as CSA C22.2 charger standards, CAN/UL 2271 for light electric vehicle batteries, and ANSI/CAN/UL 2849 for e-bike electrical systems where required by the authority having jurisdiction, retailer, insurer, or marketplace.
summary.zh: 当省级电气安全法律要求电气设备获得批准时，加拿大并不将CSA、UL、ULC或类似标准视为类似CE的自愿合规推定路径。《加拿大标准委员会法》确立了SCC的国家标准化职能；实践中，加拿大电气批准通常通过SCC认可认证机构依据适用加拿大标准签发的认证标志证明。对于电动自行车，充电器通常是加拿大批准优先级最高的电气产品；在主管机关、零售商、保险方或平台要求时，电池/电气系统可能按适用的加拿大采标进行评估，例如CSA C22.2充电器标准、轻型电动车电池CAN/UL 2271以及电动自行车电气系统ANSI/CAN/UL 2849。
summary.zht: 當省級電氣安全法律要求電氣設備獲得批准時，加拿大並不將CSA、UL、ULC或類似標準視為類似CE的自願合規推定路徑。《加拿大標準委員會法》確立了SCC的國家標準化職能；實務中，加拿大電氣批准通常通過SCC認可認證機構依據適用加拿大標準簽發的認證標誌證明。對於電動自行車，充電器通常是加拿大批准優先級最高的電氣產品；在主管機關、零售商、保險方或平台要求時，電池/電氣系統可能按適用的加拿大採標進行評估，例如CSA C22.2充電器標準、輕型電動車電池CAN/UL 2271以及電動自行車電氣系統ANSI/CAN/UL 2849。

standards_or_laws: Standards Council of Canada Act, R.S.C., 1985, c. S-16
CSA C22.2 electrical safety standards for battery chargers, as applicable
CAN/UL 2271 — Batteries for Use in Light Electric Vehicle Applications, as applicable
ANSI/CAN/UL 2849 — Electrical Systems for eBikes, as applicable

gap.en: Chinese GB 42295-2023 and GB 42296-2023 evidence is not a substitute for Canadian electrical approval. Practical gaps include: charger input rating and plug configuration for Canada, certification mark from an SCC-accredited body, bilingual electrical warnings, battery pack enclosure and BMS evidence, Canadian temperature/charging assumptions, and marketplace proof that the exact SKU, model number, factory, and power supply are covered by the certificate. EU/UK EN standards can support engineering evidence, but in Canada CSA/SCC certification is compulsory where provincial electrical approval law or the authority having jurisdiction requires it.
gap.zh: 中国GB 42295-2023和GB 42296-2023证据不能替代加拿大电气批准。实际差距包括：适用于加拿大的充电器输入额定值和插头配置、SCC认可机构认证标志、双语电气警示、电池包外壳和BMS证据、加拿大温度/充电假设，以及向平台证明具体SKU、型号、工厂和电源均被证书覆盖。欧盟/英国EN标准可作为工程证据支持，但在加拿大，如省级电气批准法律或主管机关要求，CSA/SCC认证属于强制要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB 42295-2023和GB 42296-2023證據不能替代加拿大電氣批准。實際差距包括：適用於加拿大的充電器輸入額定值和插頭配置、SCC認可機構認證標誌、雙語電氣警示、電池包外殼和BMS證據、加拿大溫度/充電假設，以及向平台證明具體SKU、型號、工廠和電源均被證書覆蓋。歐盟/英國EN標準可作為工程證據支持，但在加拿大，如省級電氣批准法律或主管機關要求，CSA/SCC認證屬於強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required — electrical equipment must be approved/certified to Canadian requirements by an SCC-accredited certification body or accepted field evaluation process when provincial electrical-safety rules or the authority having jurisdiction require it
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 42295-2023 + GB 42296-2023 for electrical safety and chargers in China

source.publisher: Department of Justice Canada — Standards Council of Canada Act

summary.en: China's e-bike electrical safety framework includes GB 42295-2023 for e-bike electrical safety and GB 42296-2023 for e-bike battery chargers, with GB/T 36972-2018 used for lithium-ion battery performance and safety. These Chinese standards use different certification, marking, plug, language, and enforcement systems from Canadian electrical approval.
summary.zh: 中国电动自行车电气安全框架包括GB 42295-2023（电动自行车电气安全）和GB 42296-2023（电动自行车电池充电器），并使用GB/T 36972-2018评价锂离子电池性能和安全。这些中国标准在认证、标志、插头、语言和执法体系上均不同于加拿大电气批准。
summary.zht: 中國電動自行車電氣安全框架包括GB 42295-2023（電動自行車電氣安全）和GB 42296-2023（電動自行車電池充電器），並使用GB/T 36972-2018評價鋰離子電池性能和安全。這些中國標準在認證、標誌、插頭、語言和執法體系上均不同於加拿大電氣批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 42295-2023 — Electrical safety requirements for electric bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)
GB 42296-2023 — Electrical safety — Battery charger for electric bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)
GB/T 36972-2018 — Lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles (SAMR)
